title: lathyrus aureus
intro: Lathyrus aureus, also known as the yellow pea, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Lathyrus aureus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide protection against certain diseases. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
